events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: residential job, traps & venting, observed field condition is "missing cleanout", in-service. Need to diagnose fault. Missing cleanout is a code compliance issue. IPC/UPC require cleanouts at various locations. Missing cleanout = non-compliant installation. Decision should be fail since non-compliant. Risk: medium (no immediate hazard but maintenance/drain cleaning difficulty). Component conditions: non-compliant, maybe installed-defective. Work stage: in-service. Percent complete: 100 (it's in service). Confidence high.
